name: Stir-Fry for One
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Sherry, white wine, apple juice
1/2 cup Broccoli, celery, sliced bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into very thin strips about 2 inches long.
2. In a bowl, mix cornstarch and sherry; stir in meat and let stand for 10 minutes or up to 2 hours.
3. Cut vegetables into thin strips or florets.
4. In a small bowl, combine sauce ingredients and mix well.
5. Heat oil over high heat in a wok or non-stick skillet.
6. Add garlic, ginger, and meat; stir-fry for 1 minute.
7. Add broccoli or other vegetable and stir fry until crisp tender; add water if necessary to prevent scorching.
8. Stir in seasoning sauce and continue stir-frying for another minute.
9. Makes 1 serving. Serve with hot rice or noodles.
Per serving with chicken: 292 calories, 13 g fat, 70 mg cholesterol, 259 mg sodium, 31 g protein, 15 g carbohydrate.
